description: Resolve a project's Vercel framework slug from its package.json (read-only).
rules: inspects PROJECT_PATH/package.json only — never packages or uploads
reuses the vendored deploy.sh detect_framework() matcher; emits framework.json
usage: Set PROJECT_PATH (a project dir containing package.json, or a package.json path). Output: framework.json.
limitation: Read-only: only detects. Returns "null" when no package.json is present or no known framework dependency matches.
